name: debug-mode-rca-pattern
tags: debug logging, root cause analysis, sqlite log handler, log level, observability, incident
body:
Switch log level to DEBUG during root cause analysis — no code change needed.

All nodes emit debug logs for skip paths and candidate evaluation. sqlite_log_handler.py writes at whatever level the root logger emits, so debug traces land in claude_hooks.sqlite automatically when DEBUG is active.

**Why:** Debug logs are structured but verbose — always present in code, suppressed at INFO in prod. Flipping to DEBUG during an incident surfaces the full trace without adding temporary print statements or redeploying.

**How to apply:** When a feature produces unexpected 0-count or silent-skip behaviour (e.g. backfill_memory_files writing nothing), enable DEBUG on the root logger for the session and re-read logs via mcp__claude-hooks__hooks__read_logs_sqlite. Look for skip-reason and candidate-count lines to pinpoint the failure point.
